params.name: Mead of Poem
params.description:
On Apr 12, 20000 BC, Odin took the Mead of Poem from the hands of the frost giant Suttungr.
Out of intense jealousy, two dark dwarves killed Kvasir, a creature born from the spittle of the gods, and used its blood to make an incredible elixir, the Mead of Poem, which can turn its drinker into a great poet. However, due to their arrogance, this secret treasure was eventually stolen by a frost giant. Upon learning of this, Odin personally intervened and, relying on his extraordinary wisdom, ret …
